title: Workshop Cashier POS Application

requirements.text: Create a backend Motoko actor to store and manage all application data: shop settings (logo URL, shop name, address, phone number, thank-you message), products/services catalog with stock, transactions with line items, and daily/monthly report aggregation.
acceptanceCriteria: Shop settings can be saved and retrieved persistently.
Products/services can be created, updated, and deleted with stock quantities tracked.
Transactions can be recorded with multiple line items (service or product), quantity, unit price, subtotal, and timestamp.
Backend exposes queries for daily and monthly sales totals and transaction counts.

requirements.text: Build a Shop Settings page where the owner can upload/change the shop logo, edit the shop name, address, phone number, and the thank-you message that appears on printed receipts. Changes must be persisted to the backend.

quotes: menu seting untuk rubah logo toko, nama toko, alamat toko, nomer telepon, ucapan terimakasih pada struk

acceptanceCriteria: Settings form contains fields for: logo image upload, shop name, address, phone number, and thank-you message.
Saving settings updates the backend and shows a success confirmation.
Uploaded logo is displayed in the settings page and on printed receipts.

requirements.text: Build a Catalog Management page to manage services and spare parts (products). Each item has a name, category (service vs. part), unit price, and stock quantity. Support add, edit, and delete operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Catalog list shows all items with name, category, price, and current stock.
Adding an item saves it to the backend and refreshes the list.
Editing an item updates name, price, and stock in the backend.
Deleting an item removes it from the catalog.
Stock is decremented automatically when an item is sold in a transaction.

requirements.text: Build a Cashier / New Transaction page where the cashier can search and add services or products to a cart, set quantities, view running total, apply an optional discount, record customer name and vehicle info, and finalize the transaction.

quotes: Kasir/transaksi - tambah item jasa/produk, hitung total

acceptanceCriteria: Cashier can search catalog by name and add items to cart.
Cart shows item name, quantity, unit price, and line subtotal.
Grand total is computed in real-time including any discount.
Cashier can enter customer name and vehicle info (plate number, vehicle type).
Completing the transaction saves it to the backend and clears the cart.
After completion, the receipt print dialog is automatically triggered.

requirements.text: Implement a print-friendly receipt component that uses window.print() so it works with Nativefier/Node.js desktop wrapping. The receipt must display the shop logo, shop name, address, phone number, transaction date/time, transaction ID, itemized list with quantities and prices, grand total, and the configured thank-you message.

quotes: print yang mendukung node Js. nativefier (perintah menggunakan window.print)

acceptanceCriteria: A styled receipt component renders all required fields.
A CSS print stylesheet hides navigation and non-receipt UI, showing only the receipt.
Calling window.print() from the app produces a clean, well-formatted receipt.
Receipt can also be triggered from the transaction history view for reprinting.

requirements.text: Build a Transaction History page that lists all past transactions with date, customer name, vehicle info, total amount, and a reprint button. Support filtering by date range.
acceptanceCriteria: Transaction list is paginated or scrollable and shows key transaction details.
Clicking a transaction opens its full detail/receipt view.
Reprint button on each transaction triggers window.print() for that receipt.
Date range filter narrows the list to the selected period.

requirements.text: Build a Reports page showing daily and monthly sales summaries: total revenue, number of transactions, and top-selling items. Include a date/month picker to navigate between periods.
acceptanceCriteria: Daily report shows total revenue and transaction count for a selected date.
Monthly report shows total revenue and transaction count for a selected month.
Top-selling items (by quantity sold) are listed for the selected period.
Reports data is fetched from the backend actor.

requirements.text: Design and apply a cohesive visual theme for the entire application: a clean, professional workshop/automotive aesthetic using dark navy and orange-amber accent colors, bold industrial typography, card-based layouts, and a persistent sidebar navigation with icons for Cashier, Catalog, Transactions, Reports, and Settings.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share the same color palette, typography, and component style.
Sidebar navigation is always visible on desktop with clear active-state highlighting.
App feels polished and purpose-built for a workshop environment.

constraints: Receipt printing must use window.print() only — no third-party print libraries.
All data must be stored in the Motoko backend actor — no external databases.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.

required: Workshop/automotive themed app logo — dark navy background with an orange wrench and gear icon (bengkel-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Default shop logo placeholder — minimalist orange and dark navy shield badge with text 'BENGKEL' (default-shop-logo.dim_300x300.png)
